description: Your team at the FAO Marine Resources Assessment Group requires an updated analysis of Eastern Boundary Upwelling Systems (EBUS) for the biennial SOFIA report. A fisheries assessment request has been placed on your desktop at ~/Desktop/ebus_fisheries_request.txt. Using Panoply and the available sea surface temperature climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/, complete the upwelling assessment described in the request. Deliver all required output files to ~/Documents/UpwellingAssessment/. You are a Fisheries Resource Scientist — apply your domain knowledge of marine biogeochemistry and upwelling dynamics to correctly classify the relationship between SST anomalies and biological productivity.

metadata.occupation: Fisheries Resource Scientist / Marine Ecosystem Analyst
